content_goal: Instantly communicate GRM is the premium local media company for Marion County. Establish authority and warmth in one glance.
visual_treatment: Full-bleed Ocala hero image — Spanish moss, golden light, flat terrain. Dark overlay only if white text overlays photo. GRM logo prominent top-left at 220px. Tagline below: Locally rooted. Professionally grown.
copy_direction: Lead with Ocala/Marion County identity. One clear headline that says what GRM is. Subheadline names both publications. No jargon.
conversion_goal: Scroll to learn more or direct CTA to publication that matches visitor intent — agents go to Closing Table, homeowners go to Front Porch.
notes: Three-brand hierarchy visible immediately: GRM parent, CT and FP as children. Mobile: stack vertically, logo above headline.

content_goal: Show both publications side by side so visitors self-select their path. Agents see Closing Table, homeowners see Front Porch.
visual_treatment: Two-column card layout on desktop. Each card has publication cover image, name, one-line description, and CTA button. Teal accent on hover. Dark cards on cream background.
copy_direction: Closing Table: For top-producing agents who want market intel. Front Porch: For homeowners discovering Marion County. Short and punchy.
conversion_goal: Click through to dedicated publication page. Self-selection reduces bounce — right audience reaches right content.
notes: Mobile: stack cards vertically. Equal visual weight — neither publication should dominate. Both use teal CTA buttons.

content_goal: Differentiate GRM from generic real estate marketing companies. Explain the value of premium local media content.
visual_treatment: Three or four feature cards in a grid. Icons or small photos for each. Cream background with dark text. Teal accent lines between cards.
copy_direction: Why local matters. Why premium content wins. Why agents and homeowners both need this. Data points about Marion County market.
conversion_goal: Build trust that leads to advertise inquiry or lead magnet download.
notes: Keep to 3-4 points maximum. Each card: icon or image plus headline plus two sentences. No walls of text.

content_goal: Social proof from real agents and homeowners. Show GRM is already trusted in the community.
visual_treatment: Pull quote cards with attribution. Optional headshot or local photo. Teal left accent line on cream background. Or dark cards with white text.
copy_direction: Real quotes from real people with real titles and Marion County locations. Never attribute client quotes to GRM.
conversion_goal: Reinforce decision to explore further. Trust drives conversion on advertise page.
notes: Format: First Last, Title, Location. Rotate between agent quotes and homeowner quotes. Max 3 visible at once.

content_goal: Convert agents and local businesses into advertising clients. This is the primary revenue CTA for the website.
visual_treatment: Teal background section or dark section with white text. Bold headline. Clear pricing or inquiry button. Feels premium but not salesy.
copy_direction: Reach the agents and homeowners who matter most in Marion County. Premium placement in publications read by your target audience.
conversion_goal: Click to advertise inquiry form or schedule a call. This is the money page.
notes: Must feel premium. No discount language. No desperate urgency. Confident media company energy.

content_goal: Tell the GRM origin story. Establish credibility as a media company, not a real estate brokerage.
visual_treatment: Photo of team or Ocala community scene. Cream background. Clean typography. GRM logo and tagline.
copy_direction: We are a media company rooted in Marion County. We publish two titles serving agents and homeowners. Founded to fill the gap in premium local content.
conversion_goal: Build enough trust to click advertise or subscribe to a publication.
notes: Keep short. Three to four paragraphs maximum. Link to individual publication pages for depth.

content_goal: Make it easy to reach GRM. One form, clear expectations.
visual_treatment: Simple form on cream background. Name, email, message, dropdown for inquiry type. Teal submit button. Dark text.
copy_direction: Get in touch. Whether you want to advertise, contribute, or just say hello — we are here.
conversion_goal: Form submission. Secondary: email link and social links.
notes: Inquiry type dropdown: Advertise, Contribute, General. Auto-reply via ManyChat or email automation.

content_goal: Consistent brand anchor on every page. Links, social, legal.
visual_treatment: Dark #090C0B background. White text. GRM logo left. Publication links center. Social icons right. Teal rule line above footer.
copy_direction: getrootedmedia.com and @getrootedmedia always visible. Link to both publications, advertise page, and contact.
conversion_goal: Keep visitors in ecosystem. Every footer link should lead deeper into GRM.
notes: Match PDF footer pattern: logo left, publication names and links right. Teal rule above. Consistent across all pages.
